series_type_list.description: A series of works which form a catalogue of classical compositions.
series_type_list.name: Catalogue

series_type_list.description: A series of related concerts by an artist in different locations.
series_type_list.name: Tour

series_type_list.description: A recurring festival, usually happening annually in the same location.
series_type_list.name: Festival

series_type_list.description: A series of performances of the same show at the same venue.
series_type_list.name: Run

series_type_list.description: A series of related concerts by an artist in the same location.
series_type_list.name: Residency

series_type_list.description: A series of artists honoured by the same award.
series_type_list.name: Artist award

series_type_list.description: A series of award ceremonies, usually one per year.
series_type_list.name: Award ceremony

series_type_list.description: A series of works honoured by the same award.
series_type_list.name: Work award

series_type_list.description: A series of release groups honoured by the same award.
series_type_list.name: Release group award

series_type_list.description: A series of recordings honoured by the same award.
series_type_list.name: Recording award
